name: Gonnella Carpet Installation
seoDescription: Gonnella Carpet Installation — a father-and-son team installing and repairing carpet and flooring across Santa Rosa and Sonoma County since 1980. BBB A+ rated.

hero.heading: Santa Rosa's family carpet installer since 1980
hero.subheading: Dennis and Jeff Gonnella, a father-and-son team, have installed and repaired carpet and flooring across Sonoma County for over four decades.

images.heroAlt: Gonnella Carpet Installation in Santa Rosa, CA

about.heading: Two generations, one standard
body: Gonnella Carpet Installation has been a fixture in Santa Rosa since 1980. Owner Dennis Gonnella runs the business as a small, hands-on operation alongside his son Jeff — a true father-and-son team who handle the installations themselves.

Working out of Santa Rosa and serving the wider Bay Area, the Gonnellas specialize in carpet installation, carpet repair, and a range of flooring including laminate, prefinished hardwood, and vinyl. They start with a visit to view the space and advise on the best plan before any work begins.

Customers consistently note that the team shows up on time, works diligently through the day, and cleans up before they leave. After more than four decades and a BBB A+ rating, the Gonnella name still stands for careful, personal workmanship.

services.title: Carpet Installation
services.description: Professional carpet installation for homes and businesses, planned with an on-site visit before the job begins.

services.title: Carpet Repair & Restretch
services.description: Repairs and refastening to bring tired or loose carpet back to life.

services.title: Hardwood & Laminate Flooring
services.description: Installation of prefinished hardwood and laminate flooring.

services.title: Vinyl & Vinyl Tile
services.description: Vinyl flooring and vinyl tile installation for kitchens, baths, and high-traffic areas.

items.quote: From our first phone call until the job was expertly finished, Gonnella Carpet was perfection!
items.author: Mary Lynne Richardson

items.a: You'll find us at 1315 Hahman Dr.
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at +17075287636 — we're glad to help.
